consistencyIssues.message: Products says Resumely 1.4.1 is live, while the latest executive review still says to submit it. The review is historical.

products.nextAction: **Still paused.** Restoring actual sync for the 9 reauth_required users needs either a working production/commercial credential set (WP-26 Steps 3-4) or pointing real users at the Evaluation-tier Internal Test app (the same Terms violation that got the old app deactivated) — there is no maintenance-mode-compatible fix available. This is a fact worth surfacing at the day-30 revisit (~2026-08-01), not a reason to resume now. See Agentic OS WP-26/27/28 for the paused relaunch scope

rows.resumely: export — 9 uploaded, 2 optimized, 1 real export (iOS, 07-10); web still unmeasurable pre-fix
rows.runsmart: plan→run — 1 of 19 got a plan, 0 ran

activation.note: No monetization / paid ads until these move (EXD-013). Both funnels founder/QA/bot-excluded per the exclusion rule. Analytics identity hardening shipped 07-07 (PostHog $identify/$create_alias wiring) so future reads can exclude the tester account that owned 22/23 of all Supabase activity. PR #90 (Stories 2-4 upload-picker friction fixes) merged 07-08 — next funnel read should show the effect on real (non-founder) traffic. 07-10: iOS shows a first real export_success (1), and a web observability fix is written (uncommitted, codex/fix-web-export-observability) that closes the zero-click-tracking gap on the web button — 'export is broken' was never actually confirmed for web, only unmeasured.

workflows.name: Repo refresh (rebuilds this page)
workflows.how: Re-reads every repo and rebuilds all auto sections of this page.

workflows.name: Live numbers refresh (PostHog layer)
workflows.how: Claude pulls founder-excluded PostHog numbers and updates the funnels, traffic and founder queue on this page.

workflows.name: Weekly CEO review
workflows.how: Reads the whole portfolio and picks the week's top 3. Output lands on the Executive tab.

workflows.name: COO operating review
workflows.how: Answers 'what do I do next?' from current evidence when you feel lost between sessions.

workflows.name: Distribution growth review
workflows.how: Logs the weekly growth cycle: what ran, what the numbers did, what to try next. Feeds the Growth tab.

workflows.how: The human-readable week summary in the vault (07-Weekly-Reviews).
